user.title: Nice
user.description: Choose an available connection mode. Local + cloud fallback is the recommended policy when cloud transport is available.

data_description.connection_mode: How Home Assistant should reach this Nice device. Only modes supported by this version are shown.

local.title: Connect locally
local.description: Enter the local NHK credentials for the Nice interface. Close MyNice/MyNice Pro before validating the connection.

data_description.name: Display name for this gate in Home Assistant.
data_description.host: Address that Home Assistant uses to reach the Nice interface on the local network.
data_description.target_mac: Interface MAC address from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.username: NHK username from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.password: 64-character hexadecimal NHK password from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.advanced: Configure the source/controller ID, port, device ID, or T4 timeout.

local_advanced.title: Advanced local settings
local_advanced.description: Keep the defaults unless your extracted credentials or device require different protocol settings.

data_description.source_id: Source/controller ID from the extracted MyNice credentials. Leave empty to use the username.
data_description.port: Local Nice interface TLS port. The default is 443.
data_description.device_id: NHK device ID to control. Leave at 1 unless troubleshooting a different device.
data_description.t4_timeout_ms: Timeout sent inside local T4 requests, in milliseconds.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Set up {name}
zeroconf_confirm.description: Discovered {model} at {host}. Enter its local NHK credentials. Close MyNice/MyNice Pro before validating the connection.

data_description.name: Display name for this gate in Home Assistant.
data_description.username: NHK username from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.password: 64-character hexadecimal NHK password from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.advanced: Configure the source/controller ID, port, device ID, or T4 timeout.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Nice
reauth_confirm.description: Update the local credentials for this Nice interface. The MAC address must match the existing device.

data_description.name: Display name for this gate in Home Assistant.
data_description.host: Address that Home Assistant uses to reach the Nice interface on the local network.
data_description.port: Local Nice interface TLS port. The default is 443.
data_description.target_mac: Interface MAC address from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.username: NHK username from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.password: 64-character hexadecimal NHK password from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.source_id: Source/controller ID from the extracted MyNice credentials. Leave empty to use the username.
data_description.device_id: NHK device ID to control. Leave at 1 unless troubleshooting a different device.
data_description.t4_timeout_ms: Timeout sent inside local T4 requests, in milliseconds.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Nice
reconfigure.description: Update the local connection settings for this Nice interface. The MAC address must match the existing device.

data_description.name: Display name for this gate in Home Assistant.
data_description.host: Address that Home Assistant uses to reach the Nice interface on the local network.
data_description.port: Local Nice interface TLS port. The default is 443.
data_description.target_mac: Interface MAC address from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.username: NHK username from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.password: 64-character hexadecimal NHK password from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.source_id: Source/controller ID from the extracted MyNice credentials. Leave empty to use the username.
data_description.device_id: NHK device ID to control. Leave at 1 unless troubleshooting a different device.
data_description.t4_timeout_ms: Timeout sent inside local T4 requests, in milliseconds.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to validate the local connection. Check LAN access to the configured TCP port, close MyNice/MyNice Pro, then check Home Assistant logs for the exact failure.
error.connection_mode_unavailable: This connection mode is not available in the installed version.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the extracted username, source ID, target MAC, and password.
error.invalid_device_id: Enter a valid 12-digit hexadecimal interface MAC address.
error.invalid_protocol: The device returned a malformed or unsupported local protocol response.
error.unsupported_device: The device authenticated but does not expose a compatible local control protocol.
error.wrong_device: The MAC address does not match this configured Nice interface.

abort.already_configured: This Nice interface is already configured
abort.missing_identity: The discovered interface did not advertise a stable hardware identity
abort.not_operational: This advertisement is for device provisioning and cannot accept control commands
abort.unsupported_device: This Nice product family does not yet have a compatible transport
abort.unsupported_service: This Nice network service is not supported
